command.text: select rtrim(b.ma_nv) ma_nv, rtrim(b.ho_nv) + space(1) + rtrim(b.ten_nv) ho_ten, rtrim(b.bo_phan) ma_bp, rtrim(b.vi_tri) ma_vi_tri, case @@language when 'v' then c.ten_bp else c.ten_bp2 end ten_bp%l, case @@language when 'v' then d.ten_vtr else d.ten_vtr2 end ten_vi_tri%l from @@table a left join hrnv b on a.stt_rec_nv = b.stt_rec left join hrbp c on b.bo_phan = c.ma_bp left join hrvt d on b.vi_tri = d.ma_vtr where a.stt_rec_nv = @stt_rec_nv return

declare @q nvarchar(4000), @d1 smalldatetime, @lastDateFrom smalldatetime, @i int, @currentday int, @countMonth int, @maxDay int declare @sqlUpdate nvarchar(4000), @d nvarchar(4000), @s nvarchar(4000), @f nvarchar(4000), @k nvarchar(32), @j nvarchar(32), @l int
select @countMonth = datediff(month, @$tu_ngay, @$den_ngay), @maxDay = 36
if datediff(day,@$tu_ngay, @$den_ngay) > @maxDay - 1 select @$den_ngay = dateadd(day, @maxDay - 1, @$tu_ngay) select @lastDateFrom = dateadd(d, -1, dateadd(mm, datediff(m, 0, @$tu_ngay) + 1,0)) if @lastDateFrom > @$den_ngay select @lastDateFrom = @$den_ngay select @d1 = @$tu_ngay, @currentday = day(@$tu_ngay), @i = 1, @q = '', @f = '', @k = '', @sqlUpdate = '', @d = '', @l = 1
while @l < 32 begin select @k = case when @l > 9 then rtrim(@l) else '0' + rtrim(@l) end select @d = @d + 'isnull(n' + @k + ', '''')+' select @l = @l + 1 end select @d = substring(rtrim(@d), 0, len(@d)) while @countMonth >= 0 begin if @d1 > @lastDateFrom select @lastDateFrom = @$den_ngay select @s = '' while @currentday <= day(@lastDateFrom) begin select @k = ltrim(@i), @j = replace(str(@currentday, 2), ' ', 0) select @s = @s + replace('n' + @j + ' = @$n%f, ', '%f', @k), @f = @f + case when @f <> '' then ',' else '' end + '@$n' + @k + ' varchar(32)' select @currentday = @currentday + 1, @i = @i + 1 end select @s = substring(rtrim(@s), 0, len(@s)) select @q = @q + char(13) + 'update hrca$' + convert(char(6), @d1, 112) + ' set ' + replace(@s, '''', '''''') + ' where stt_rec_nv = ''' + replace(@stt_rec_nv, '''', '''''') + '''' select @sqlUpdate = @sqlUpdate + char(13) + 'update hrca$' + convert(char(6), @d1, 112) + ' set status = case when (rtrim(' + @d + ')) <> '''' then ''1'' else ''0'' end where stt_rec_nv = ''' + replace(@stt_rec_nv, '''', '') + '''' select @sqlUpdate = @sqlUpdate + char(13) + 'update hrca$' + convert(char(6), @d1, 112) + ' set datetime0 = getdate(), datetime2 = getdate(), user_id0 = @@userID, user_id2 = @@userID where stt_rec_nv = ''' + replace(@stt_rec_nv, '''', '') + '''' select @d1 = dateadd(month, 1, @d1), @currentday = 1, @countMonth = @countMonth - 1 end while @i <= @maxDay begin select @f = @f + ', @$d' + ltrim(@i) + ' varchar(32)' select @i = @i + 1 end execute sp_executesql @q, @f, @$n01, @$n02, @$n03, @$n04, @$n05, @$n06, @$n07, @$n08, @$n09, @$n10, @$n11, @$n12, @$n13, @$n14, @$n15, @$n16, @$n17, @$n18, @$n19, @$n20, @$n21, @$n22, @$n23, @$n24, @$n25, @$n26, @$n27, @$n28, @$n29, @$n30, @$n31, @$n32, @$n33, @$n34, @$n35, @$n36 exec sp_executesql @sqlUpdate /*

action.text:
declare @q nvarchar(4000), @d1 smalldatetime, @i int declare @column nvarchar(4000), @value nvarchar(4000), @day smalldatetime, @day2 smalldatetime select top 0 *, n01 as n32, n01 as n33, n01 as n34, n01 as n35, n01 as n36, n01 as n37, n01 as n38, n01 as n39, n01 as n40 into #tmp from hrca$000000
if datediff(day,@DateFrom, @DateTo) > 39 select @DateTo = dateadd(day, 39, @DateFrom) select @d1 = @DateFrom, @day = @DateFrom, @i = 1, @q = ''
while convert(char(6), @d1, 112) <= convert(char(6), @DateTo, 112) begin select @column = '', @value = '' select @day2 = cast(convert(char(6), dateadd(month, 1, @d1), 112) + '01' as smalldatetime) - 1 if @day2 > @DateTo set @day2 = @DateTo while @day <= @day2 begin select @column = @column + case when @column = '' then '' else ', ' end + 'n' + replace(str(@i, 2), ' ', 0) select @value = @value + case when @value = '' then '' else ', ' end + 'n' + replace(str(day(@day), 2), ' ', 0) select @day = dateadd(day, 1, @day), @i = @i + 1 end if @column <> '' select @q = ' insert into #tmp(stt_rec_nv,' + @column + ') select stt_rec_nv,' + @value + ' from hrca$' + convert(char(6), @d1, 112) + ' where stt_rec_nv = ''' + replace(@s, '''', '') + '''' exec sp_executesql @q select @d1 = dateadd(month, 1, @d1) end
select max(n01) as n01, max(n02) as n02, max(n03) as n03, max(n04) as n04, max(n05) as n05, max(n06) as n06, max(n07) as n07, max(n08) as n08 , max(n09) as n09, max(n10) as n10, max(n11) as n11, max(n12) as n12, max(n13) as n13, max(n14) as n14, max(n15) as n15, max(n16) as n16 , max(n17) as n17, max(n18) as n18, max(n19) as n19, max(n20) as n20, max(n21) as n21, max(n22) as n22, max(n23) as n23, max(n24) as n24 , max(n25) as n25, max(n26) as n26, max(n27) as n27, max(n28) as n28, max(n29) as n29, max(n30) as n30, max(n31) as n31, max(n32) as n32 , max(n33) as n33, max(n34) as n34, max(n35) as n35, max(n36) as n36, max(n37) as n37, max(n38) as n38, max(n39) as n39, max(n40) as n40 from #tmp group by stt_rec_nv drop table #tmp
return
